description_long: This house features a modern, geometric design with clean white walls and large, grid-patterned windows that wrap around the structure, allowing for ample natural light. The building consists of two main volumes: a rectangular section and an adjoining octagonal section, the latter of which supports a rooftop terrace with outdoor furniture and a large umbrella. The terrace is adorned with potted plants, adding a touch of greenery to the otherwise minimalist exterior. The main entrance is recessed beneath a flat overhang supported by two columns, and is flanked by tall windows and a small planter. The house sits on a green lawn base, emphasizing its urban residential context. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with an emphasis on open, airy spaces and functional outdoor living.
description: A modern, white house with large grid windows, a rooftop terrace, and a geometric, minimalist design. Features include a recessed entryway, outdoor seating, and abundant natural light.
description_view_0: Shows the main rectangular volume with expansive grid windows and a glimpse of the rooftop terrace on the adjoining octagonal section.
description_view_1: Highlights the octagonal section with the rooftop terrace, umbrella, and outdoor furniture, as well as the vertical window arrangement.
description_view_2: Displays the front entryway with columns, the main door, and both the rectangular and octagonal sections, emphasizing the house's layered geometry.
description_view_3: Presents the rear of the house, dominated by a large, unbroken white wall with grid windows and minimal exterior features.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large grid-patterned windows and bay windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with flat overhang, supported by two columns, flanked by tall windows and a small planter
